one_line_positioning: AI Product Engineer who ships production-grade multi-agent systems and drives business outcomes
narrative_angle: Product-minded AI engineer with deep LLM API and agent orchestration expertise, ready to build customer-facing AI features for a D2C brand
proof_points_to_emphasize: Built production multi-agent AI system for enterprise quality management at Omnex
Co-founded Emote, scaled to 450+ users, reduced latency and cost dramatically
Led migration from Azure to PostgreSQL at Akkodis, improving reporting accuracy by 5%
tone_guidance: Confident, outcome-focused, design-thinking aware, technically precise
recruiter_first_impression_target: AI engineer who can own a product feature end-to-end and communicate with CEO
reasoning: Strong match on must-haves (Python, LLM API, SQL) and hidden expectations (business-outcome thinking, CEO-facing communication). Frontend gap is mitigated by role's AI focus. No retail experience is a risk but transferable via personalization and intelligence layer. User's private constraints align with Nicobar's culture (lean, founder-led, design-driven).
